title: Connect Backend to /dashboard/client with Collapsible Cards and Task Management

requirements.text: Update the Task type in backend/main.mo to include all required fields: id (Text), tipeLayanan (Text), judulTask (Text), detailTask (Text), deadline (Int), createdAt (Int). Update the shared createTask function to validate that the selected layanan is active (status == #aktif) and owned by the caller (clientId == msg.caller). Ensure getMyLayanan returns only layanan belonging to the calling principal.

quotes: Data yang di record ke backend adalah id task,tipe layanan,judul task,detail task,Deadline,createdAt
client hanya bisa membuat task apabila ada layanan aktif

acceptanceCriteria: Task record type contains fields: id, tipeLayanan, judulTask, detailTask, deadline, createdAt
createTask (shared) rejects if layanan does not exist or is not active
createTask (shared) rejects if layanan.clientId != msg.caller
getMyLayanan returns only layanan where clientId == msg.caller

requirements.text: On the /dashboard/client page (frontend/src/pages/DashboardClient.tsx), replace all mock/dummy data with live data fetched from the backend canister. Implement the following using React Query and the actor hook: fetch layanan list via getMyLayanan, fetch tasks grouped by status via getTaskByStatus for each status (#review, #revisi, #on_progress, #qa_asistenmu, #selesai). Display a collapsible Summary Card showing counts per task status.

quotes: Daftar layanan milik client,daftar task terkait,status registrasi,buat task, summary card

acceptanceCriteria: Summary Card is collapsible and shows counts for each task status
Daftar Layanan section fetches real data from getMyLayanan and is collapsible
All task status sections display real data from the backend
No mock or hardcoded data remains in the client dashboard

requirements.text: Add a collapsible 'Buat Task' form section to the /dashboard/client page. The form must include: a dropdown to select an active layanan (populated from getMyLayanan, only shown if more than one active layanan exists), a text input for Judul Task, a textarea for Detail Task, a date picker for Deadline, and a submit button labeled 'Buat Permintaan ke Asistenmu'. The form must only be enabled/shown when the client has at least one active layanan. On submit, call the shared createTask backend function with all required fields.

quotes: form yang sudah ada di frontend adalah Pilih layanan (layanan aktif client dropdown jika lebih dari satu), Judul task,detail task, deadline (date), tombol buat permintaan ke asistenmu

acceptanceCriteria: Form is collapsible
Layanan dropdown only appears when client has more than one active layanan
Form is disabled or hidden if client has no active layanan
Submitting calls createTask on the backend canister with id, tipeLayanan, judulTask, detailTask, deadline, createdAt
Success and error states are shown to the user after submission

requirements.text: On the /dashboard/client page, render five separate collapsible task status cards under a 'Daftar Task Kamu' section: (1) Meminta Review (#review), (2) Task on Revisi (#revisi), (3) Task on Progress (#on_progress), (4) Task QA Asistenmu (#qa_asistenmu), (5) Task Selesai (#selesai). Each card lists tasks belonging to the client for that status. Each individual task entry inside a card should also be collapsible to show full details.

quotes: buatkan juga card task Meminta review kamu (#review),Task on Revisi (#revisi),Task on Progress (on_progress), Task QA Asistenmu ((#qa_asistenmu),Task Selesai (#selesai)

acceptanceCriteria: Five collapsible status cards are rendered under 'Daftar Task Kamu'
Each card displays only tasks matching its status for the logged-in client
Individual task entries within each card are collapsible showing full task details
Cards reflect live data from the backend

requirements.text: Add a collapsible 'History' card at the bottom of the /dashboard/client page that displays recent activity for the client, such as task creation events and status changes, derived from the available task data.

quotes: card History di bawah untuk aktifitas user

acceptanceCriteria: History card is collapsible and placed at the bottom of the dashboard
History card lists recent task-related activity for the client
History data is derived from real backend task data

constraints: Break backend changes into the smallest possible incremental update to avoid build failures
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Client must not be able to create or modify Layanan — only Tasks
All cards on /dashboard/client must be collapsible
nonGoals: Building or modifying the partner or internal admin dashboards
Adding real-time updates or WebSocket features
Changing the registration flow or approval logic
